## Resource Quality Checklist

- [ ] Resource is relevant to the category
- [ ] Link works
- [ ] Canonical/original source is used
- [ ] Description is original
- [ ] Category is correct
- [ ] Level is correct
- [ ] Cost/license is clear
- [ ] Tags are included
- [ ] No spam or affiliate-only content
- [ ] No copied content from other lists
